title: Martyn’s Law for education settings
body: "This information explains what the act will do when it comes into force. It will be useful for:   early years settings local-authority-maintained schools academies further education colleges independent schools DfE-funded independent training providers privately owned training providers universities and other higher education establishments   The Home Office, the Security Industry Authority and the Department for Education will publish separate statutory guidance during the implementation period before the legislation comes into force in 2027.  "
